meaning: adj.不自私的,无欲的,慷慨的
examples: As a player he was unselfish, a true team man.
She started to get a reputation as an unselfish girl with a heart of gold.
Organ donation to strangers is considered an unselfish act.
Yesterday I shared a few ways to make your goals exciting, unselfish, and memorable.
More unselfish work by McAllister enabled Peter Thompson to fire Linfield's third goal on 45 minutes.
